REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT EDWIN ALEXANDER OCON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCON, EDWIN ALEXANDER $275.27 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $360.27 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
